summary: All 10 requirements (REQ-45 through REQ-54) appear to be implemented in the diff. Both new pages are created, routes are registered in App.tsx, and BookingConfirmationPage.tsx is updated. The truncated diffs show all major features including video mock, chat, file upload, e-prescription, live tracking, ETA countdown, contact doctor, and entry-point buttons. No hallucinated features are evident.
